en.name: Sanji

en.name: Gum-Gum Dawn Whip
en.effectText: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn. Then, up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 power or less cannot activate [Blocker] during this turn. [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 power or less.

jp.name: ゴムゴムの白い鞭
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このターン中、パワー+1000。その後、相手のパワー4000以下のキャラ1枚までは、このターン中、【ブロッカー】を発動できない。 【トリガー】相手のパワー4000以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: Gum-Gum Dawn Whip
definition.text: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn. Then, up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 power or less cannot activate [Blocker] during this turn. [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 power or less.

en.name: Gum-Gum Mole Pistol
en.effectText: [Main] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −5000 power during this turn. Then, if you have a Character with 6000 power or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 2000 power or less. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.

jp.name: ゴムゴムのモグラ銃
jp.effectText: 【メイン】相手のキャラ1枚までを、このターン中、パワー-5000。その後、自分のパワー6000以上のキャラがいる場合、相手のパワー2000以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。 【トリガー】このカードの【メイン】効果を発動する。

definition.name: Gum-Gum Mole Pistol
definition.text: [Main] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −5000 power during this turn. Then, if you have a Character with 6000 power or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 2000 power or less. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.
